title: Man (20) stabbed, found in open field
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A 19-year-old suspect is arrested following the death of a 20-year-old man in Reigerpark, Pacaltsdorp, on New Year’s Day.


> Police Spokesperson Sgt. Chris Spies said they are investigating a murder. The victim was found in an open field near Sunstone and Topaz Streets at about 20:00 last night, 1 January.


“Police were dispatched to the scene where a man was found in an open field where he collapsed.

On arrival at the scene, they found the man with a stab wound inside the ambulance. He was declared dead by paramedics,” says Spies.

The 19-year-old suspect will appear in court once charged.

“As this is an ongoing investigation, more suspects could be arrested as the investigation unfolds,” says Spies.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
